headlines.title: Skild acquires Fetch Robotics assets from Zebra
headlines.summary: Skild AI acquires Zebra Technologies’ robotics arm to deploy its hardware-agnostic "brain" and automate end-to-end warehouse fulfillment.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Antioch raises funding to bring ‘software speed’ to robot development
headlines.summary: Antioch has raised money to scale its team and apply simulation to accelerate robotics testing and validation.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.

headlines.title: AGIBOT deploys semi-humanoid robots in electronics manufacturing
headlines.summary: Longcheer has integrated multiple AGIBOT G2 robots into its tablet production lines, and plans to deploy 100 by Q3 2026.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.

headlines.title: Tesla to share roadmap for building AMRs at Robotics Summit & Expo
headlines.summary: Joshua Joseph, an AMR Deployment Engineer at Tesla, will present a roadmap for deploying AMRs in legacy manufacturing environments.

political_items.title: Trump's Lebanon ceasefire takes Israel by surprise
political_items.summary: Few Israelis see this truce as a way out of the conflict with Hezbollah, the BBC's Lucy Williamson writes.

political_items.title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
political_items.summary: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.

political_items.title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
political_items.summary: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

political_items.title: Russia launches deadliest aerial attack in months, killing 18 in Ukraine
political_items.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.
